prompt: Deep stack proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Call controls risk when depth edge is not strong enough to raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Call fits because deeper stacks keep the hand playable without forcing a thin raise.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is better here because deep stacks still leave room to maneuver after the flop, while your edge is too marginal to force a raise right now. A controlled continue keeps playability without bloating the pot before you own a clearer pressure advantage.
